generated_oml:
instance InputCurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor measuring input current for the MABI MAX 100 robot's first axis"
    DTDFVocab:producedData InputCurrentDataTransmitted
]

instance MotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor encoder mounted directly on the motor of the MABI MAX 100 robot's first axis"
    DTDFVocab:producedData PositionDataTransmitted
]

instance SecondaryEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary encoder mounted behind the gearbox of the MABI MAX 100 robot's first axis"
    DTDFVocab:producedData PositionDataTransmitted
]

instance InputCurrentDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom InputCurrentSensor
    DTDFVocab:fromData InputCurrentData
    base:desc "Input current data streamed via MQTT protocol to the digital shadow"
]

instance PositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder, SecondaryEncoder
    DTDFVocab:fromData PositionData
    base:desc "Position data streamed via MQTT protocol from motor and gearbox encoders"
]

instance InputCurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured input current data from the motor"
    DTDFVocab:fromData InputCurrentDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTDataStreaming, SimulinkSimulationTool
]

instance PositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Position data from motor and gearbox encoders"
    DTDFVocab:fromData PositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationTool, SysMLModelingTool
]

instance MeasuredTorqueDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom InputCurrentSensor, MotorEncoder, SecondaryEncoder
    DTDFVocab:fromData MeasuredTorqueData
    base:desc "Measured torque data derived from current and position sensors"
]

instance MeasuredTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured torque data from the robot's first axis"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MeasuredTorqueDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationTool
]

instance SimulatedTorqueDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SimulinkCoulombViscousModel, SimulinkStribeckModel, SimulinkDahlModel, SimulinkLuGreModel
    DTDFVocab:fromData SimulatedTorqueData
    base:desc "Simulated torque data generated by friction models"
]

instance SimulatedTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated torque data from friction models"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SimulatedTorqueDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationTool
]

instance AngularVelocityDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder, SecondaryEncoder
    DTDFVocab:fromData AngularVelocityData
    base:desc "Angular velocity data derived from position sensors"
]

instance AngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Angular velocity data derived from encoder position measurements"
    DTDFVocab:fromData AngularVelocityDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationTool
]

instance SysML_BDD : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Block Definition Diagram for the MABI MAX 100 robot's first axis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLModelingTool
]

instance SysML_IBD : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Internal Block Diagram for the MABI MAX 100 robot's first axis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLModelingTool
]

instance SimulinkCoulombViscousModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Coulomb-Viscous friction model simulation in Simulink"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationTool
]

instance SimulinkStribeckModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Stribeck friction model simulation in Simulink"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationTool
]

instance SimulinkDahlModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dahl friction model simulation in Simulink"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationTool
]

instance SimulinkLuGreModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "LuGre friction model simulation in Simulink"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationTool
]

instance SysMLModelingTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML for structural modeling of the robot's first axis"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService, VisualizationService
]

instance SimulinkSimulationTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MathWorks Simulink for friction model simulation"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService, MotionAccuracyEnhancementService
]

instance AssetAdministrationShell : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell for digital representation of physical assets"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService, VisualizationService
]

instance MQTTDataStreaming : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for data streaming between physical and virtual components"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService, VisualizationService
]

instance SiemensSINUMERIK840DslCNCController : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl CNC controller driving the motor"
    DTDFVocab:enables MotionAccuracyEnhancementService
]

instance DashboardVisualization : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Dashboard for integrated visualization of robot data"
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationService
]

instance FrictionIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous identification of joint friction using white-box and black-box models"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionIdentificationInsight
]

instance VisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Integrated visualization of friction data in a dashboard"
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationInsight
]

instance MotionAccuracyEnhancementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Enhancement of robot motion accuracy through model-based control algorithms"
    DTDFVocab:provides MotionAccuracyAction
]

instance TwinningProcessService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Purpose-driven methodology involving problem identification, asset and model analysis, creation of calculations/models, and data identification steps"
    DTDFVocab:provides TwinningProcessInsight
]

instance FrictionIdentificationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Friction identification insights used to inform control algorithms for improved motion accuracy"
]

instance VisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Visualized friction data for monitoring and analysis"
]

instance MotionAccuracyAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adjustment of control algorithms to enhance motion accuracy"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance TwinningProcessInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insights from twinning process methodology for digital twin evolution"
]

instance PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Permanent magnet synchronous motor converting electrical current to rotational torque"
]

instance Gearwheel : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Gearwheel component in the MABI MAX 100 robot's first axis transmission"
]

instance CycloidalGearbox : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Cycloidal gearbox component in the MABI MAX 100 robot's first axis transmission"
]

instance RobotFirstAxis : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "The first axis of the MABI MAX 100 industrial robot, comprising a permanent magnet synchronous motor, gearwheel, and cycloidal gearbox, used for analyzing joint friction and improving motion accuracy."
    base:contains PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor, Gearwheel, CycloidalGearbox
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time data processing with live measurements and continuous updates for friction model identification."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Integration of structural and behavioral models with live operational data, processed through simulation components and visualized in a unified dashboard for real-time friction analysis."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "As operated, capturing real-time operational data including wear and variations due to different tools or applications."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Validation through comparison of simulated versus measured data to identify deviations in joint friction; multi-physics-aware models considering load, temperature, and time dependencies."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for real-time sensor data transmission from physical system to digital shadow."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Adherence to Asset Administration Shell (AAS) standards for industrial asset representation and SysML for model-based systems engineering."
]
